verses.2: Before Ephraim, Benjamin, and Manasseh, stir up your might!
verses.5: You have fed them with the bread of tears,
verses.6: You make us a source of contention to our neighbors.
verses.7: Turn us again, God of Armies.
verses.8: You brought a vine out of Egypt.
verses.9: You cleared the ground for it.
verses.10: The mountains were covered with its shadow.
verses.11: It sent out its branches to the sea,
verses.12: Why have you broken down its walls,
verses.13: The boar out of the wood ravages it.
verses.14: Turn again, we beg you, God of Armies.
verses.15: the stock which your right hand planted,
verses.17: Let your hand be on the man of your right hand,
verses.18: So we will not turn away from you.
verses.19: Turn us again, LORD God of Armies.
